message:
chore(beads): re-close drifted beads (33 today-shipped)

Per memory feedback_br_sync_drift, prior closes keep getting
clobbered by other agents' br sync flushes from stale SQLite.
Direct JSONL edit. The underlying code fixes are unaffected.
